item.dc:creator: DOcelot1

item.title: Ro Khanna did a funny.
item.description: Excerpt: Representative Ro Khanna (D‑CA) has announced plans to force a vote in the House of Representatives demanding the full, unredacted release of all documents related to disgraced financier and convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein. In a post on X, formerly Twitter, Khanna said he will introduce an amendment this week that would require the House Speaker to bring the measure to a roll-call vote, putting every member of Congress on the record. Newsweek contacted Khanna's team via email and House Speaker Mike Johnson via online form for comment outside of usual working hours on Sunday. Source: https://www.newsweek.com/democrat-ro-khanna-demands-vote-release-full-jeffrey-epstein-files-2098309
item.dc:creator: Mirrormancer

item.dc:creator: Illosernati

item.title: Found A "Yooperlite"
item.description: "Yooperlite" on Lake Superior! – These rocks are sodalite in syenite and the sodalite part glows when a long wave UV light is shined onto them! Hunting these is so much fun!! – By: Thecrystalcollector – Bryan Major #rocks #awesome #aww #nature #mildly_interesting

item.title: LAST CALL to sign the Stop Killing Games UK Petition
item.description: 14 July 2025 is the deadline for the Stop Killing Games petition to the UK Parliament. That means there are less than two days left to sign. https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/702074/ This petition asks to "prohibit publishers irrevocably disabling video games they have already sold". It managed to pass the 100k threshold needed for discussion, but more votes signal a stronger intent. Currently, it there are just over 185k signatures. Can we get the total over 200k?
item.dc:creator: The11thPlague

item.dc:creator: violetblue12

item.title: Big Gay Abbie's Big Gay Discord Server is shutting down.
item.description:
Hey guys. So, it's currently 2333 in the evening and I've been thinking. After a bit of drama, a bit of thinking, and a bit of soul searching, I think it's time I call it a day. This place has been going since 02/07/2019, and started off basically as a spinoff server of a couple of places with the simple idea of "What if the #memes channel of a discord was a full server". It started with friends from various servers, and then opened up to the public and, well, the rest is history. It's been a great project, and it's been a highlight of this server so far, but I think it's time we call it quits. The reason is simple: I don't think I can do it anymore. I am *not* cut out to be a server owner. I can socially awkward and hella Autistic and having to deal with drama and make calls on things ever now and again, when to ban, when not to ban, and when you get woken up at 3am and having to deal with shit while half awake, it's not something I'm cut out for. Even with the support of Mods (Thank you Grae, Yogs and yes, even Jules), it's not easy and it can get very stressful. Not merely dealing with drama, but even dealing with illegal shit. This place has gotten very big, and it's changed a lot and frankly, I don't want this place to fade away into something it wasn't meant to be, and I don't want to just abandon it to adminless, modless chaos. It's been great, but all good things have to come to an end at sometime. Such is the nature of time. And events, recently, have lead me to believe that now is the time rather than later. I know this place has become a place for support for some of you, and I'm sorry but I don't think this place can be a "support" place, it wasn't designed for that. I've had a moment where I became an "unexpected social worker" in my professional life and I am not up for that. I think it's time I move on, I suspect other people might create servers for themselves, friends servers, a little like how this place started out. It's been an honour, and a privilage, but yeah, I think this is the time. It's been great, but I'll shut this place down at 12:15 BST. Thank you. Abbie.
I'll take a week off from meme posting to get things together, but it's been great. Thank you.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1412 (fridge cigarette)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "bwreeep." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 5) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride

item.title: Sunday night and all is well
item.description:
This is Frank
Frank loves the windowsill
I don't know how he manages to be upside down on the windowsill and neither does Chessie. We're just gonna go with it.
Frank has recently discovered the joy of poofballs
Like really discovered the joy
He's even learned to play fetch. Sometimes.
Frank. You have to let. go. Stop the growling...
Bonus zoomed out shot of Chessie and Frank enjoying the evening sun. Goodnight. This weekend seemed really short, but don't they always? Have a good night and pleasant dreams.
item.dc:creator: FrankTheKitten

item.title: Randomly Marsh
item.dc:creator: SnickOrangeCouch

item.title: We slip beneath the pillow's spell - And drift from heaven and into hell
item.description:
To lose control of conscious mind The secrets of our soul to find.
A timeless journey fills our being. The blind man now becomes all-seeing.
The lonely now becomes the lover. The childless wife a loving mother.
Reflection of our dormant fears Once woken may reduce to tears.
With sleep the master free to prey On untold thought which nightly stray.
ART: https://www.artstation.com/fannibajer POEM: "Dream" by Jane A Beresford
item.dc:creator: stardustLUST

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #164
item.description: The wanna-be emperor has no clothes and people are finally saying it out loud. MAGA is still tearing itself apart over who lied about the Epstein files while Senate documents prove the Secret Service director lied to Congress about denying Trump security. Noem flat-out denies her own agency's paperwork delayed FEMA call centers when flood survivors desperately needed help. Meanwhile, Biden calls Trump and the GOP "liars" while King Charles manages Trump with transparent royal theater. People are bringing receipts to contradict the hollow denials of malfeasance and cruelty. Keep calling out what everyone can see. Start locally. There's an online discussion Tuesday at 4pm ET with the League of Women Voters that should provide good grounding as you prep for Thursday's protests. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com 1. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-antisemitism-dc-takeover 2. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-butler-report 3. https://go.govbrief.today/patriot-missiles-ukraine 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-uk-visit-september 5. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-denies-phone-problems 6. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-complains-judges-political 7. https://go.govbrief.today/biden-calls-gop-liars Yesterday's Top Story - https://go.govbrief.today/bongino-bondi-epstein-schism Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/lwv-remaking-commons Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
